narrative:
Cols 69-L (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,370 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
